visuals.title: Paging Address Translation
visuals.description: Animated diagram showing how a logical address is translated to a physical address through the page table, with frame lookup and offset passthrough

steps: Extract page number p from logical address
Look up page table[p] to get frame number f

diagrams.title: TLB Address Translation
diagrams.description: Fast path vs slow path for address translation using TLB cache

diagrams.title: Two-Level Page Table
diagrams.description: Hierarchical page table structure to handle large address spaces

translation: Use p1 to index outer page table
Get pointer to inner page table
Use p2 to index inner table

diagrams.title: Page Table Entry (PTE) Fields
diagrams.description: Contents of each page table entry

diagrams.title: Inverted Page Table
diagrams.description: One entry per physical frame instead of per logical page

data.concept: One entry per frame containing process ID + page number
advantages: Saves memory for large address spaces
